records.ety: [L. e out + dulcoratus, p. p. of dulcorare to sweeten, fr. dulcor sweetness, fr. dulcis sweet: cf. F. dulcorer.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Edulcorated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Edulcorating.]

defs: To render sweet; to sweeten; to free from acidity.
quotes: Succory . . . edulcorated with sugar and vinegar.

defs: To free from acids, salts, or other soluble substances, by washing; to purify.
